category_sources: Official GNU manual describes Gengetopt as a tool for writing command-line option parsers for C programs
source_facts.description says it generates C code for getopt_long command-line parsing
display_name_sources: Official GNU manual title is GNU Gengetopt 2.23
source_facts.homepage is the GNU Gengetopt page
docs_sources: Official GNU manual is dedicated documentation
Official GNU project page links to documentation and source instructions
repo_sources: Official GNU Gengetopt page states the Git repository can be browsed at git.savannah.gnu.org/cgit/gengetopt.git
tags_sources: Official GNU manual documents command-line option parser generation
source_facts.description mentions C code and getopt_long
